title: Just Treats Teddy Bears (500g Share Bag)
features: Teddy Bears - Our Teddy Bears candy is a delightful mix of bright colours and playful shapes, perfect for adding a touch of joy and whimsy to any occasion.
Freshness You Can See: The transparent polypropylene packaging of Teddy Bears showcases their quality, ensuring a fresh treat every time.
Sweet Surprises: Delight in the fun of sharing Teddy Bears from our 500g bags, a treat for any group occasion.
Gourmet Experience: Teddy Bears set the standard for luxury sweets, delivering a truly gourmet experience.

Our Teddy Bears are hand-packed with care and affection in Lancashire, UK, by our devoted team. By choosing this product, you are not only indulging in a delightful treat but also supporting the local community and job creation.
description: Perfect for any occasion, enjoy the delightful taste of Teddy Bears - Our Teddy Bears candy is a delightful mix of bright colours and playful shapes, perfect for adding a touch of joy and whimsy to any occasion. These gummy candies are shaped like adorable teddy bears, making them as cute to look at as they are delicious to eat. Each bear is a burst of fruity flavour, crafted to please the palate with its sweet and chewy texture. Ideal for parties, as a fun snack for kids, or simply for anyone who loves a little colour and sweetness in their day, these Teddy Bears are sure to bring smiles and satisfaction. The variety of colours in each pack makes them a visually appealing treat, perfect for decorating, sharing, or enjoying all on your own. Dive into the playful world of our Teddy Bears candy and let your taste buds embark on a delightful adventure!, conveniently contained in a 500g bag for sharing and enjoyment.
